title: Matt Harris
compiled_truth: Matt Harris is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-17 to 2001-08-23), Matt Harris sent 6 and received 25 emails, totalling 31 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jennifer Medcalf](people/jennifer-medcalf) (4), [Dale Clark](people/dale-clark) (3), [Patrick Tucker](people/patrick-tucker) (3), [Dorothy Woster](people/dorothy-woster) (2), [Sarah-Joy Hunter](people/sarah-joy-hunter) (1).
